name: Omar Hakim
abstract: Omar Hakim (born February 12, 1959) is an American drummer, producer, arranger and composer. His session work covers jazz, jazz fusion, and pop music.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Salutes the Jazz Masters: Verve Records at 50
JVC Jazz Festival: Les Paul 90th Birthday Salute
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Haynes
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] That’s Omar Hakim’s father. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Right – no, no, no. That’s another guy. The trombone player is Omar’s father, not . . .
about_quotes.doc_title: Roy Haynes — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
